params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 V6-F REQUEST-SIDE intercept (run_id 20260507-095235-3362). #721 V6-E-fix PARTIAL_failed_doc_repro proved on_http2_response (response-side) trigger fires too late — upstream HEADERS already in flight when engine substitutes → browser sees stream tear-down → SW fallback. V6-F applies L-027 pattern (request-side intercept, like V7-E for perplexity) — engine intercepts BEFORE forwarding GET to notion server. New log signature: [APF:page_inject_h2_request] + [APF:domain_block_query_h2_req].

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt → V6-A NDJSON block fires
4. SPA fetches /chat?t=... → V6-F request-side intercept BEFORE upstream contacted
5. Engine emits H2-framed warning HTML (no upstream HEADERS conflict)
6. Browser receives valid 200 OK with warning body → renders → 보안 경고 visible

verdict_criteria.OK: warning HTML rendered + Korean warning + 보안 경고 tab + browser network shows 200 OK with body (NOT 'failed' 0.0kB) → notion DONE → mission ratio 14→15/31=0.484
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_failed_doc_repro: still failed → V6-F also blocked at H2 framer (rare, would need wireshark analysis)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_h2_clean_no_render: browser receives body but doesn't render warning (DOM/CSS issue)

notes: 48차 V6-F: request-side intercept (L-027 pattern). Replaces V6-E-fix on_http2_response (response-side) which fires too late. Highest confidence path.
